name: Sunshine Silver Mining & Refining Co
business: Sunshine Silver Mining & Refining Co is a mining company focused on developing the Sunshine Complex in Idaho. The company plans to restart the Sunshine Mine and construct a new mill to produce silver, antimony, copper, and lead. It also intends to develop refineries for silver/copper and antimony to process concentrates on-site.

exposures.sentence: Our business strategy is to develop the Sunshine Complex to its full potential. This includes restarting the Sunshine Mine (including construction of a new mill), unlocking exploration potential both in the Sunshine Mine Core Area and within the large, newly consolidated and highly prospective regional land package, the potential refurbishment, construction and restart of the Sunshine Silver/Copper Refinery and potential development of the Sunshine Antimony Plant.

Additionally, we expect that the development of the Sunshine Antimony Plant would provide sufficient capacity to process any antimony we produce as well as third-party antimony feed, enabling us to become a critical minerals production hub and potentially the largest producer of finished, refined antimony in the United States.

demand for silver is driven by its general perception as a store of value as well as its uses in industrial processes and products, such as solar panels, superconductors, personal electronics, electric vehicles, sensors, photovoltaic cells and corrosive-resistant welding, and other emergent themes including AI, nano silver and biocides.

catalysts.event: Completion of Feasibility Study for the Sunshine Mine restart
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate this will result in the completion of a Feasibility Study in early 2027 that will combine the technical, economic and risk analyses required to support a final investment decision.

catalysts.event: Initial production from the Sunshine Mine
catalysts.sentence: we expect to deliver initial production by the end of 2028.

catalysts.event: 15,000-meter surface drill program on land package
catalysts.sentence: Consistent with Scout's recommended roadmap, our exploration planning contemplates systematic sampling, mapping and geochemistry along with an approximately 15,000-meter surface drill program in 2026 for testing target areas on our land package, including the Pine Creek and Rock Creek areas.

catalysts.event: Exploration spending of $10 million on broader land package
catalysts.sentence: For the 2026 field season, we plan to spend approximately $10 million for the planned exploration of the broader land package.
